mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_PARAGRAPH ( MEMBER_ID, PARAGRAPH_SET_ID, FRONT_LANG, FRONT_TEXT, BACK_LANG, BACK_TEXT, MEMO, DISPLAY_ORDER, IS_ACTIVE ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{paragraphSetId}, #{frontLang}, #{frontText, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{backLang}, #{backText, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{memo, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{displayOrder}, #{isActive} )
mapper.sql: p.PARAGRAPH_ID, p.PARAGRAPH_SET_ID, ps.SET_NAME AS setName, p.FRONT_LANG, p.FRONT_TEXT, p.BACK_LANG, p.BACK_TEXT, p.MEMO, p.DISPLAY_ORDER, p.IS_ACTIVE, p.CREATED_AT, p.UPDATED_AT
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM TB_PARAGRAPH p JOIN TB_PARAGRAPH_SET ps ON ps.PARAGRAPH_SET_ID = p.PARAGRAPH_SET_ID AND ps.MEMBER_ID = p.MEMBER_ID WHERE p.PARAGRAPH_SET_ID = #{paragraphSetId} AND p.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND p.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' AND ps.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' ORDER BY p.DISPLAY_ORDER ASC, p.PARAGRAPH_ID ASC

SELECT
FROM TB_PARAGRAPH p JOIN TB_PARAGRAPH_SET ps ON ps.PARAGRAPH_SET_ID = p.PARAGRAPH_SET_ID AND ps.MEMBER_ID = p.MEMBER_ID WHERE p.PARAGRAPH_ID = #{paragraphId} AND p.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND p.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' AND ps.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'
mapper.update:
UPDATE TB_PARAGRAPH
FRONT_LANG = #{frontLang}, FRONT_TEXT = #{frontText, jdbcType=CLOB}, BACK_LANG = #{backLang}, BACK_TEXT = #{backText, jdbcType=CLOB}, MEMO = #{memo, jdbcType=CLOB}, DISPLAY_ORDER = #{displayOrder}, UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP
WHERE PARAGRAPH_ID = #{paragraphId} AND MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'
UPDATE TB_PARAGRAPH SET IS_ACTIVE = 'N', UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE PARAGRAPH_ID = #{paragraphId} AND MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'
UPDATE TB_PARAGRAPH SET IS_ACTIVE = 'N', UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE PARAGRAPH_SET_ID = #{paragraphSetId} AND MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'
